name: my-activity
_note: bounties.my-activity is the per-user dashboard: the caller's posted bounties + the submissions they filed + their earnedCc + resolvedCount. Scoped to the assassin's internal owner actor, so {} returns ok:true with empty arrays + 0 counters on a fresh store (never no_user/no_db). earnedCc is the in-memory leaderboard counter, never a wallet read.
